chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Acknowledgment of Debt by a Sick Person in Favor of an Heir

text: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَوْصَى لِبَعْضِ وَرَثَتِهِ بِأَنَّ لَهُ عَلَيْهِ دَيْناً فَقَالَ "إِنْ كَانَ اَلْمَيِّتُ مَرْضِيّاً فَأَعْطِهِ اَلَّذِي أَوْصَى لَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5542 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Mansur ibn Hazim, who said:
'I asked Abu Abdullah (as), about a man who, in his will, acknowledged a debt to one of his heirs.'
Imam (as) said: "If the deceased was in a sound state of health, then give him what was bequeathed to him."
